title: Bare Bones x Smooth Bow Animations
description: Bare Bones textures for Smooth Bow Animations ! 🏹
body:
This resource pack is a Bare Bones version of [Smooth Bow Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/smooth-bow-animations) !

I recommend using [No Resource Pack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings)
